subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest upon the Countenance and standest at the Gate, hearken unto what hath been raised from the rustling of the divine Lote-Tree [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها الناظر الی الوجه و القائم لدی الباب اسمع ما ارتفع من حفیف سدره
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @praise and encouragement
